mapper.insert: MERGE INTO sync_watermark t USING (VALUES (#{tableName}, #{lastSyncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS s(table_name, last_sync_version, last_sync_time, updated_at) ON t.table_name = s.table_name WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET last_sync_version = s.last_sync_version, last_sync_time = s.last_sync_time, updated_at = s.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (table_name, last_sync_version, last_sync_time, updated_at) VALUES (s.table_name, s.last_sync_version, s.last_sync_time, s.updated_at)

INSERT INTO sync_watermark (table_name, last_sync_version, last_sync_time, updated_at) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{lastSyncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_sync_version = VALUES(last_sync_version), last_sync_time = VALUES(last_sync_time), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
